# SumUp Article Editor

> Import, manage, and re-export SumUp item CSVs. Authenticated web app for editing articles,
> categories, barcodes, and variations before exporting back to SumUp's 47-column CSV format.

## Links

- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/sebseb7/articleMgmt)

## Important notes

- No article, category, or user data is publicly available; all content requires authentication.
